proof_components.step1_phase_boundary: H_mod=0 at all 5 phase boundaries: proved (sinc²(j/4) for j=0..4)
proof_components.step2_positive_interior: H_mod>0 inside each phase: proved (sinc²>0, sin²>0 away from integers)
proof_components.step3_existence: At least 1 max per phase: proved (Rolle/IVT on discrete grid)
proof_components.step4_uniqueness: Exactly 1 max per phase: G'/G strictly decreasing (cot), F'/F finite negative → IVT gives unique crossing

verdict: C15 PROVED: H_mod has exactly 4 maxima for all primes p>=11
